sql: SELECT id, jenis_surat, petugas, nip, kode_nomor_surat, hp_petugas, syarat, sop, CASE WHEN id = 1 THEN ' Izin Operasional' WHEN id = 2 THEN ' Rekom SBSN' WHEN id = 3 THEN ' Rekom Siswa Pindah' WHEN id = 4 THEN ' Pengantar' ELSE concat('',`jenis_surat`) END AS ico FROM jenis_surat
name: jenis_surat

fields.name: ico
fields.sqlExpression: CASE WHEN id = 1 THEN ' Izin Operasional' WHEN id = 2 THEN ' Rekom SBSN' WHEN id = 3 THEN ' Rekom Siswa Pindah' WHEN id = 4 THEN ' Pengantar' ELSE concat('',`jenis_surat`) END
